heading: Special rules for plans undersection 404(c) of title 26
label: 1396 Special rules for plans undersection 404(c) of title 26
notes: References in Text, referred to in subsec. (a)(1)(B)(ii), (2)(C), was repealed by , , .Section 1423 of this titlePub. L. 113–235, div. O, title I, § 108(a)(1)128 Stat. 2786Dec. 16, 2014

children.heading: Amount of withdrawal liability; determinative factors
children.label: a Amount of withdrawal liability; determinative factors
A
children.text: the amount determined under , orsection 1399(c)(1)(C)(i) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: the number of contribution base units for which the employer would have been required to make contributions for the prior plan year if the employer had not withdrawn, multiplied by

children.label: ii
children.text: the contribution rate for the plan year which would be required to meet the amortization schedules contained in section 1423(d)(3)(B)(ii) of this title (determined without regard to any limitation on such rate otherwise provided by this subchapter)1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: A
children.text: as a result of prior employer withdrawals in any plan year commencing after , the number of contribution base units is reduced to less than 67 percent of the average number of such units for the calendar years 1974 through 1979; andJanuary 1, 1980

children.label: B
children.text: at least 50 percent of the withdrawal liability attributable to the first 33 percent decline described in subparagraph (A) has been determined by the plan sponsor to be uncollectible within the meaning of regulations of the corporation of general applicability; and

children.label: C
children.text: the rate of employer contributions under the plan for each plan year following the first plan year beginning after and preceding the termination date equals or exceeds the rate described in section 1423(d)(3) of this title.September 26, 19801
it is a plan described in or a continuation thereof; andsection 404(c) of title 26
participation in the plan is substantially limited to individuals who retired prior to .January 1, 1976

children.heading: Amount of liability of employer; “a year of signatory service” defined
children.label: c Amount of liability of employer; “a year of signatory service” defined
A
children.text: the amount of the employer’s withdrawal liability determined without regard to this section, and

children.label: i
children.text: the numerator of which is an amount equal to the portion of the plan’s unfunded vested benefits that is attributable to plan participants who have a total of 10 or more years of signatory service, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the denominator of which is an amount equal to the total unfunded vested benefits of the plan.

For purposes of paragraph (1), the term “a year of signatory service” means a year during any portion of which a participant was employed for an employer who was obligated to contribute in that year, or who was subsequently obligated to contribute.
